positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_events
% SZS output start Saturation.
% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define sad(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define happy(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_events
% SZS output start Saturation.
% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define happy(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define sad(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
